mapper.select: /* 대시보드 공통 모든공지목록조회 : TOPIC - ALL_NOTICE, BADGE - 게시글헤더 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'ALL_NOTICE' TOPIC, CASE WHEN BBS_TYCD = 'CRS_NTC' THEN 'ALL' ELSE 'SUBJECT' END BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD IN ('NTC','CRS_NTC') ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 공통 과정공지목록조회(전체) : TOPIC - CRS_NOTICE, BADGE - 전체 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'ALL_CRS' TOPIC, 'CRS_NTC' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'CRS_NTC' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 교수과목공지목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_SBJCT_NOTICE, BADGE - 과목 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_SUBJECT_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'SUBJECT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ADM.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 교수강의Qna목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_LCTR_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_LCTR_QNA' AS TOPIC, 'USER_IMG' AS BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 교수일대일상담목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_ONE_ON_ONE, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MIN(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_ONE_ON_ONE' AS TOPIC, 'USER_IMG' AS BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 학생과목공지목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_SUBJECT_NOTICE, BADGE - 과목 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_SUBJECT_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'SUBJECT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATNDLC.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 학생강의Qna목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_LCTR_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_LCTR_QNA' TOPIC, 'SUBJECT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATNDLC.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 대시보드 자료실목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_DATARM, BADGE - 없음 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_DATARM' TOPIC, 'DATARM' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'DATA' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}
/* 과목홈 공통 과목공지사항목록조회 : TOPIC - SBJCT_NOTICE, BADGE - 점 */
/* 과목홈 공통 과목강의Qna목록조회 : TOPIC - SBJCT_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */
/* 과목홈 교수과목일대일상담목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_SBJCT_ONE_ON_ONE, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */
/* 과목홈 자료실목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_SUBJECT_DATARM, BADGE - 점 */
